TaskDescription: Finger tapping task with lateralized auditory cues. Three conditions (30 trials each, random order): left-ear cue prompting left-hand tapping, right-ear cue prompting right-hand tapping, and silent control. Each tapping period lasts 5 seconds. Inter-stimulus intervals of 20-35 seconds.
Instructions: When you hear a sound in your left ear, tap your left thumb to each finger on the left hand for the duration of the sound. When you hear a sound in your right ear, tap your right thumb to each finger on the right hand for the duration of the sound.
NIRSPlacementScheme: Motor cortex montage with 8 sources, 8 long-separation detectors, and 8 short-separation detectors (D9-D16, ~7-8mm separation)

StimulusPresentation.AdditionalHardware: ER2 insert headphones, Fireface UCX audio interface
